Misconfigurations.Title: S3 bucket should have versioning enabled
Misconfigurations.Description: S3 bucket does not have versioning enabled
Misconfigurations.Message: Resource 'aws_s3_bucket.my_bucket' does not have versioning enabled

Misconfigurations.Title: S3 bucket encryption should use Customer Managed Keys
Misconfigurations.Description: S3 bucket encryption does not use a customer-managed key
Misconfigurations.Message: Resource 'aws_s3_bucket.my_bucket' does not use a customer-managed key
Misconfigurations.Resolution: Enable encryption using a customer-managed key
